title: Harness Task State
description: Per-task machine state sidecar. Lives at .harness/{slug}/04-generate/task-{id}.json. Written only by the harness CLI; never edited by hand or by Claude directly.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes; CLI rejects unknown versions.

id.description: Task identifier in the form PHASE.TASK (e.g., '1.2'). Must match an id in the current plan.

phase.description: Phase number this task belongs to.

status.description: Current execution state. Transitions managed by 'harness log'. 'blocked' means retry budget exhausted and user intervention is required.

attempts.description: Number of times Agent execution has been attempted for this task. Incremented each time status moves to 'running'.

started.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent attempt's start. Null if never run.

completed.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of terminal-state transition. Null if still running or never finished.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent sidecar write.

outputs.description: Files the task declared or actually produced. Populated by 'harness log --outputs' and verified by 'harness verify'.

path.description: Path relative to the project root.

size.description: Byte size at last verification. Missing if not yet verified.

exists.description: Whether the file existed at last verification.

depends_on.description: Task ids this task depends on. Copied from plan at log-time to detect plan drift.

last_error.description: Error summary from the most recent failed attempt. Null on success.

plan_checksum.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized task definition from the plan at execution time. Mismatch with current plan indicates stale state.
